findings.description: Knowledge file labels the outbound/return processing section as '**[復路処理]**', but the source file reads '**[往路での処理]**'. The source label appears to be a typo (the RST anchor is `_outbound`), but the knowledge file silently corrects it to different text not present in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `**[往路での処理]**` (with RST anchor `.. _outbound:`)

findings.description: The type column for `permissionFactory` is listed as `PermissionFactory` in the knowledge file, but the source table has the typo `PermissionFactorry` (double 'r'). The knowledge file silently corrects this, introducing text not present verbatim in the source.
`FwHeaderReader` is referenced in the s1 section content (in the DataReadHandler row) but is absent from the s1 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `:doc:`../reader/FwHeaderReader`` appears in the DataReadHandler description within the 関連するハンドラ table
